summary: Iteration 57 - Paid Mentor Slots Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: Admin Settings toggle verified, CMS Mentorship Schedule price input shows/hides correctly based on toggle state. All paid slot flows working as expected.
seed_data_creation: Test slots created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 Paid Mentor Slots feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) PUT /api/admin/settings with mentor_slots_paid_enabled persists correctly, 2) GET /api/public/settings returns mentor_slots_paid_enabled (no auth required), 3) Toggle OFF: Free booking flow works for both free and priced slots (no 402), 4) Toggle OFF: Checkout endpoint returns 400 'Paid mentorship is currently disabled', 5) Toggle ON + paid slot: Book returns 402 'Use the checkout flow', 6) Toggle ON + paid slot: Checkout creates Stripe session with URL starting https://checkout.stripe.com, creates pending_payment booking, 7) Toggle ON + free slot: Checkout returns 400 'use the free booking flow', 8) Checkout status endpoint works (returns payment_status), 9) Cancel pending_payment booking works, 10) Slot price_cents and currency persisted and returned in GET /api/admin/mentorship/slots, 11) CMS Settings page shows 'Paid Mentor Slots (Stripe)' toggle with data-testid='mentor-slots-paid-toggle', 12) CMS Mentorship Schedule slot dialog shows Price (USD) input only when toggle is ON (data-testid='slot-price-input'), 13) Regression: iCal feed works, Global Events work, Member mentor-calendar endpoint works. Toggle left OFF after testing.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/mentorship/slots: PASS - Returns price_cents and currency fields
backend_apis.Toggle OFF + checkout: PASS - Returns 400 'Paid mentorship is currently disabled'
backend_apis.Toggle ON + paid slot checkout: PASS - Returns Stripe URL and session_id
backend_apis.Toggle ON + free slot checkout: PASS - Returns 400 'use the free booking flow'

frontend_cms.Toggle state display: PASS - Shows 'Disabled — bookings remain free' when OFF
frontend_cms.Slot dialog (toggle ON): PASS - Price (USD) input visible with data-testid='slot-price-input'

regression_tests.Member mentor-calendar: PASS - Endpoint works (0 slots for admin user)

stripe_integration_notes: Stripe checkout URL generation works with test key. Actual payment completion not tested (as instructed). Checkout status endpoint returns 'pending' payment_status since no real payment was made.
